use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and pages
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and interfaces
Navigation triggers linking to different routes or sections
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Features accessible focus states with ring outlines, shadow styling, and full disabled state support. The component uses forwardRef for proper ref handling and supports composition via asChild prop.
